title: festuca × belensis subsp. muellerstollii
intro: Festuca × belensis subsp. muellerstollii, also known as Festuca muellerstollii, is a hybrid plant species of the genus Festuca, specifically a subspecies of the meadow fescue. It is reported to have medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, with its extracts exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Festuca × belensis subsp. muellerstollii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, coughs, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its possible role in reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create teas or by using its extracts in tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
